music: upbeat retro jazz beat, acoustic double bass, light brush drums, instrumental

beats.narration: Before it conquered the world, coffee was a secret energy.

shots.scene: a vintage map of Ethiopia, a cut-out coffee tree with glowing red coffee cherries, hands reaching from the edges
shots.element_motion: the coffee cherries glow, hands gently bob, map details fade in with halftone dots

beats.narration: Discovered by dancing goats in the high mountains.

shots.scene: a playful cut-out goat leaping high, a shepherd Kaldi gesturing in surprise, paper-collage mountains behind them
shots.element_motion: the goat bobs up and down as if dancing, Kaldi's arms move slightly, mountain layers drift creating depth

beats.narration: Now, it drives the modern world's energy.

shots.scene: a close-up of a steaming vintage coffee cup, paper steam rising, radiating sunburst lines in the background
shots.element_motion: paper steam swirls and floats upwards, background sunburst lines pulse gently, cup is static
